title: Ubiquiti UISP-P uninterruptible power system UISP Power
category: Powering / Industrial powersource / Power sources with charging (UPS)
description: UISP series uninterruptible power system designed for MicroPoP applications, which includes routers and switches. The separately sold connection cable UACC-Cable-PT is available in different lengths from 0.5m to 50m, and cables of different lengths can also be connected together using the outdoor cable connector UACC-Cable-PT-Ext The UISP-P can be powered by one or two DC power sources UACC-Adapter-PT-120W, which can be purchased separately. By connecting one source, you get an output power of 100W , with two sources it is then possible to use twice the power of 200W . For the backup function, a Li-ion battery pack with a power of 115 Wh is included in the package, and a lead-acid battery with a voltage of 24 V can also be connected externally One 10/100Mbps Ethernet port is used for connection to the data network.
